name: AgriSync Founder Dashboard
description: Tier-0 North Star + Tier-1 guardrails. All metrics from mis.* contracted views. Refresh: nightly 02:00 IST.

card.name: NSM — WVFD / Farm (rolling 7-day)
card.description: North Star Metric. Target ≥ 4.5. Churn threshold < 3 for 2 consecutive weeks.

native.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(wvfd)::numeric, 2) AS wvfd_per_farm FROM mis.wvfd_weekly WHERE week_start >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

card.name: WVFD Trend (last 12 weeks)
card.description: Each point is avg WVFD/farm for that week. Look for sustained ≥ 4.5.

native.query: SELECT week_start, ROUND(AVG(wvfd)::numeric, 2) AS avg_wvfd FROM mis.wvfd_weekly WHERE week_start >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '84 days' GROUP BY week_start ORDER BY week_start
SELECT ROUND(retention_pct::numeric, 1) AS d30_retention_pct FROM mis.d30_retention_paying ORDER BY cohort_week DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(median_hours::numeric, 1) AS median_verify_lag_hours FROM mis.log_verify_lag ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1

card.name: Correction Rate (%)
card.description: Target ≤ 15%. Rising = operator confusion or lying.

native.query: SELECT ROUND(correction_rate_pct::numeric, 1) AS correction_rate_pct FROM mis.correction_rate ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1

card.name: Voice-Log Share (%)
card.description: Target ≥ 40%. Below = AI not earning its cost.

native.query: SELECT ROUND(voice_pct::numeric, 1) AS voice_share_pct FROM mis.voice_log_share ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1

card.name: Schedule Compliance (%)
card.description: Target ≥ 50%. Below 50% = farmers don't believe the schedule.

native.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(compliance_pct)::numeric, 1) AS avg_compliance_pct FROM mis.schedule_compliance_weekly WHERE week_start >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

card.name: Engagement Tier Distribution (this week)
card.description: A=Power, B=Core, C=Casual, D=At-risk. PMF = ≥25% in tier A.

native.query: SELECT tier, COUNT(*) AS farm_count FROM mis.engagement_tier WHERE week_start = (SELECT MAX(week_start) FROM mis.engagement_tier) GROUP BY tier ORDER BY tier

card.name: Activation Funnel
card.description: Latest cohort week drop-off per step.

native.query: SELECT step_name, count FROM mis.activation_funnel WHERE cohort_week = (SELECT MAX(cohort_week) FROM mis.activation_funnel) ORDER BY step_order

card.name: Schedule Migrations This Month
card.description: How many schedules are being swapped. High = catalog iteration happening.

native.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS migrations FROM mis.schedule_migration_rate WHERE week_start >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

card.name: Silent Churn Watchlist (paid, WVFD=0, 2+ weeks)
card.description: Call these farms before they cancel.

native.query: SELECT farm_id, owner_phone, owner_name, weeks_silent, last_log_date FROM mis.silent_churn_watchlist ORDER BY weeks_silent DESC LIMIT 20

card.name: AI Cost / Farm (USD, last 7 days)
card.description: Monitor Gemini spend per farm. Budget alert if > $0.50/farm/week.

native.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(cost_usd_7d)::numeric, 4) AS avg_ai_cost_per_farm FROM mis.gemini_cost_per_farm
